description: Implement provider test workflows: 'Test Single Provider' button on individual provider cards, 'Test All Providers' button in the page header, and provider test contracts that validate executor connectivity, model listing, and basic request/response format compliance.
steps: 1. Update src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/providers/components/ProviderCards.tsx to add a 'Test' button (small icon button with a play/zap icon) on each ProviderCard and ApiKeyProviderCard. On click, it should call handleBatchTest('provider', providerId) which is already wired in the page.

2. Add a 'Test All' button in the providers page header (src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/providers/page.tsx) above all sections. This button calls handleBatchTest('all') and uses mode='all' in the test-batch API.

3. Add provider test contract types in src/shared/constants/providers.ts: export interface ProviderTestContract { connectivity: boolean; modelListing: boolean; chatCompletion: boolean; } and a helper function getProviderTestCapabilities(providerId) that returns which tests are applicable (e.g., noAuth providers skip API key validation).

4. Update src/app/api/providers/test-batch/route.ts to handle mode='all' by testing all active connections across all groups (oauth + free + apikey + compatible). Also handle mode='provider' with a providerId to test a single provider's connections.

5. Enhance ProviderTestResultsView in src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/providers/components/ProviderTestResults.tsx to show test contract details: which phases passed (connectivity, auth, model listing, chat), latency for each phase, and error details on failure.

6. Add tests/unit/provider-test-workflows.test.ts testing: (a) test-batch route handler logic for mode='all' and mode='provider', (b) ProviderTestContract type is well-formed, (c) getProviderTestCapabilities returns correct capabilities for different provider types.
acceptance_criteria: Individual provider cards have a visible 'Test' button that triggers provider-specific batch test
A 'Test All Providers' button exists in the page header
mode='all' in test-batch route tests all active connections
mode='provider' with providerId tests only that provider's connections
ProviderTestResultsView shows expanded diagnostic info (connectivity, auth, model listing phases)
ProviderTestContract interface and getProviderTestCapabilities helper are exported from providers.ts
New test passes: npm run test -- provider-test-workflows
